# tskulbru.dev

> Personal technical blog and portfolio by Torstein Skulbru — Technical Lead & Fullstack Developer specializing in Kubernetes, Go microservices, cloud architecture, and mobile development.

## Author
- Name: Torstein Skulbru
- Role: Technical Lead & Fullstack Developer
- Employer: Iteam Solutions AS
- Location: Norway
- Expertise: Kubernetes, Go, Azure, Android/iOS, DevOps, GitOps, Database Design

## Content

### Blog Posts
Technical deep-dives on cloud-native architecture, DevOps practices, and mobile development:
- Building Mockingjay: Secure Video Recorder: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/building-mockingjay-secure-video-recorder/
- Building Stao: Standing Desk Companion: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/building-stao-standing-desk-companion/
- Beyond the Dev Team: Unlocking AI for Every Department: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/empowering-non-technical-staff-with-ai/
- AI Junior Developers Learning Trap: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/ai-junior-developers-learning-trap/
- Azure Spot VMs AKS Guide: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/azure-spot-vms-aks-guide/
- Building Kvile: Lightweight HTTP Client: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/building-kvile-lightweight-http-client/
- Claude Code Go Developer Workflow: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/claude-code-go-developer-workflow/
- DB Migrations with golang-migrate in Kubernetes: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/db-migrations-golang-migrate-kubernetes/
- GitHub Release Management for Kubernetes GitOps: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/github-release-management-kubernetes-gitops/
- Building Resilient Microservices with K8s Circuit Breakers: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/building-resilient-microservices-k8s-circuit-breakers-retries-chaos-engineering/
- Slash AKS Costs with Spot VMs: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/slash-aks-costs-production-workload-spot-vms/
- How I Built IssueFlow: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/how-i-built-issueflow-turn-slack-conversations-into-github-issues-with-ai/
- Bluesky Comments on My Blog: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/bluesky-comments-on-my-blog/
- HTTP Files with Kulala in Neovim: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/http-files-kulala-neovim-api-testing/
- Android Release Management with GitHub Actions & Fastlane: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/android-release-management-github-actions-fastlane/
- What is fitSystemWindows: https://tskulbru.dev/posts/what-is-and-how-do-i-even-fitsystemwindows/

### Portfolio
13 shipped apps and projects: https://tskulbru.dev/portfolio/
- Plask: Analytics dashboard with AI insights (Next.js, Supabase, Claude AI)
- APIDrift: API breaking change alerts & migration guides
- Linetris: Mobile puzzle game
- Stao: Standing desk companion app (iOS)
- MyVisualRoutine: Visual routine planner
- BiblieWise: Bible study app with AI
- Mockingjay: Secure video recorder (iOS)
- NEIMR: Norwegian Emergency Info & Map Reporting
- Kvile: Lightweight HTTP client library (Go)
- GraceLock: App lock for Android
- StartRemoteWork: Remote work resources
- BuzzBlast: Group notification app
- IssueFlow: Slack-to-GitHub issue creator
